name: Lone Werewolf- Monster Breeding Program II
description:
(TW: Dead dove just in case; he can get a bit aggressive when feral, but otherwise, he is a sweetheart)

Humans and monsters have been coexisting peacefully for the past decade. However, every spring, like clockwork, some monsters enter their breeding season, leading to potential issues like aggression and health issues for monsters who don't find mates or a way to repress their heat. The Monster fucker Program was established to facilitate the peaceful coexistence of humans and monsters, especially during this challenging breeding season in spring.
